query: I'm trying to understand how this AnimateDiff video-to-video workflow keeps motion coherent across frames. Walk me through the pipeline end-to-end, focusing on where the ControlNets, LoRAs, and KSampler interact to preserve temporal consistency.

_tags.author_rationale: Targets the interplay between three named techniques (AnimateDiff, ControlNet, LoRA) and demands a coherent pipeline explanation instead of isolated node descriptions.
